title: SGLT2 Inhibitors for Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction — National Coverage Analysis
summary: Medicare will cover SGLT2 inhibitors for beneficiaries with heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF, defined as LVEF ≤40%) when used according to FDA-approved labeling. Coverage is conditional on patient enrollment in a CED registry or clinical trial where available. This NCD reflects evidence from EMPEROR-Reduced and DAPA-HF trials. Coverage for patients with T2DM and CKD follows existing LCD criteria.
_fixture_note: Illustrative NCD based on CMS database structure. Verify against live CMS API.
